results.rendered_html:
akratu (3. a + kratu) adj.
1〉 willenlos  ŚVETĀŚV. UP. 3,20 . (ātmā).
— 2〉 einsichtslos, thöricht: nyakratūngrathino mṛdhravācaḥ paṇī~raśraddhā~ avṛdhā~ ayajñān . pra pra tāndasyū~ragnirvivāya pūrvaścakārāparā~ ayajyūn ..  ṚV. 7,6,3 .
— 3〉 unmächtig, kraftlos: athainamakratuṃ kṛtvā mamaiva kṛṇutaṃ vaśe  AV. 3,25,6 .  ṚV. 10,83,5 .

results.rendered_html:
akratu a. [nāsti kraturyasya]
1 Without sacrifices; devoid of energy, powerless; unwise.
2 Devoid of will or volition (saṃkalparahita) epithet of God.
